mapper.insert: INSERT INTO teams (id, name, short_name, code, country, country_code, founded, logo, is_national, venue_id, venue_name, venue_city, venue_capacity, venue_surface, venue_image, league_id, season, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{shortName}, #{code}, #{country}, #{countryCode}, #{founded}, #{logo}, #{isNational}, #{venueId}, #{venueName}, #{venueCity}, #{venueCapacity}, #{venueSurface}, #{venueImage}, #{leagueId}, #{season}, NOW(), NOW())

INSERT INTO teams (id, name, code, country, founded, is_national, logo, venue_id, venue_name, venue_city, venue_capacity, venue_surface, venue_image, league_id, season, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{code}, #{country}, #{founded}, #{isNational}, #{logo}, #{venueId}, #{venueName}, #{venueCity}, #{venueCapacity}, #{venueSurface}, #{venueImage}, #{leagueId}, #{season}, NOW(), NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = VALUES(name), code = VALUES(code), country = VALUES(country), founded = VALUES(founded), is_national = VALUES(is_national), logo = VALUES(logo), venue_id = VALUES(venue_id), venue_name = VALUES(venue_name), venue_city = VALUES(venue_city), venue_capacity = VALUES(venue_capacity), venue_surface = VALUES(venue_surface), venue_image = VALUES(venue_image), league_id = VALUES(league_id), season = VALUES(season), updated_at = NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE teams SET name = #{name}, short_name = #{shortName}, code = #{code}, country = #{country}, country_code = #{countryCode}, founded = #{founded}, logo = #{logo}, is_national = #{isNational}, venue_id = #{venueId}, venue_name = #{venueName}, venue_city = #{venueCity}, venue_capacity = #{venueCapacity}, venue_surface = #{venueSurface}, venue_image = #{venueImage}, league_id = #{leagueId}, season = #{season}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM teams ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}

select * from teams where id in
#{id}
